/usr/bin/cc -fsanitize=address,undefined -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/RoleProxyTest.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/RoleProxyTest.dir/model/role_proxy_test.c.o -o RoleProxyTest  ../libcore.a ../puremvc/libpuremvc.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtk-4.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpangocairo-1.0.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpango-1.0.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libharfbuzz.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgdk_pixbuf-2.0.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcairo-gobject.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcairo.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libvulkan.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgraphene-1.0.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgio-2.0.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgobject-2.0.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libglib-2.0.so
